text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, early in the morning...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? And what's gotten you looking so glum?
Worried about something?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! So you haven't seen much growth in
your running? Well, I have just the—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, this is cause for concern! But fear not, I
will lend you my assistance!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's clear you're plotting something, so I'll just ask
my friend for help.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Aw, don't be like that. I'm one of your friends
too, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And now that you've brought it up... What does
your friend have to say about your performance?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sigh... She says I need to pick up more speed on the final stretch...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see! Did she just say that? ...Could this breeze
blowing right now actually be—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...No, that's just the wind.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Moving on. I would like to know if your
friend has any other concerns. Would you mind
asking her for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Manhattan Cafe mediates a discussion
between her friend and Agnes Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, you just scored a pretty good time!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I... I did it... thanks to you two...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah well, I've benefited plenty myself, what with
witnessing this level of growth in such a short
amount of time... Truly fascinating.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Although, it's a shame I couldn't establish direct
contact with your invisible friend...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if in response to Agnes Tachyon's comment, a
cold gust of wind blows by...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, seems to be getting a little chilly. Let's get
going.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, no, that gust of wind was—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Rather cold, wasn't it? You've been sweating as
well, so watch you don't get sick.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You think Tachyon's a good friend? I... don't
know about that...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
More like... I can't get away from her... or she
refuses to leave me be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A gentle breeze courses past as Manhattan Cafe
speaks...
